label: Sub-effecter
description: A single visual or audio component within an EffecterDef. Defines a particle emitter, mote spawner, sound trigger, or nested group. Each sub-effecter uses a C# runtime class selected by subEffecterClass.

subEffecterClass.label: Sub-effecter class
subEffecterClass.description: C# SubEffecter subclass instantiated at runtime via Activator.CreateInstance. Determines which fields are used and how the sub-effecter behaves.

burstCount.label: Burst count
burstCount.description: Number of motes or flecks spawned per trigger event. Supports both scalar and min~max range formats. Source default is 1~1.

ticksBetweenMotes.label: Ticks between motes
ticksBetweenMotes.description: Minimum game ticks between successive mote spawns for continuous sub-effecters. Source default is 40.

maxMoteCount.label: Max mote count
maxMoteCount.description: Maximum number of active motes this sub-effecter will maintain at once. Source default is int.MaxValue (effectively unlimited).

initialDelayTicks.label: Initial delay ticks
initialDelayTicks.description: Game ticks to wait before this sub-effecter begins spawning on the first trigger.

lifespanMaxTicks.label: Lifespan max ticks
lifespanMaxTicks.description: Maximum lifespan in game ticks for spawned motes or flecks. Source default is 999999.

chancePerTick.label: Chance per tick
chancePerTick.description: Probability per game tick that the sub-effecter will spawn. Used by chance-based classes. Source default is 0.1.

chancePeriodTicks.label: Chance period ticks
chancePeriodTicks.description: Period in game ticks over which the spawn chance is evaluated. 0 means per-tick evaluation.

spawnLocType.label: Spawn location type
spawnLocType.description: Determines where in relation to the effecter targets this sub-effecter spawns its motes.

positionLerpFactor.label: Position lerp factor
positionLerpFactor.description: Blend factor between the source and target positions used when spawnLocType is BetweenPositions. 0 is the source, 1 is the target. Source default is 0.5.

positionOffset.label: Position offset
positionOffset.description: World-space offset applied to the spawn location in addition to the computed position. Source default is Vector3.zero.

positionRadius.label: Position radius
positionRadius.description: Maximum radius in world units around the computed spawn location within which each mote is randomly placed.

positionRadiusMin.label: Position radius min
positionRadiusMin.description: Minimum radius for mote placement. Combined with positionRadius to create an annular spawn zone.

perRotationOffsets.label: Per-rotation offsets
perRotationOffsets.description: List of four world-space offsets applied based on the parent thing's rotation (North, East, South, West). Each item is a bare comma-triplet such as -0.72, 0, 0.1.

positionDimensions.label: Position dimensions
positionDimensions.description: Box dimensions for rectangular spawn zones. When set, motes spawn uniformly within a box of this size centered on the spawn location.

attachToSpawnThing.label: Attach to spawn thing
attachToSpawnThing.description: If true, spawned motes follow the thing that triggered the effecter.

avoidLastPositionRadius.label: Avoid last position radius
avoidLastPositionRadius.description: Radius around the previous spawn location that the next spawn will attempt to avoid. 0 disables avoidance.

attachPoint.label: Attach point
attachPoint.description: Named attachment point on the source thing where motes are anchored.

moteDef.label: Mote def
moteDef.description: ThingDef for the mote to spawn. Typically a Mote-category ThingDef.

fleckDef.label: Fleck def
fleckDef.description: FleckDef for the fleck particle to spawn.

color.label: Color
color.description: Tint color applied to the spawned mote or fleck. Written as an RGBA float tuple such as (1, 0, 0, 1) for red, or (1, 1, 1, 1) for white. Source default is Color.white.

angle.label: Angle
angle.description: Rotation or direction angle in degrees. Supports scalar and min~max range formats. Source default is 0~360.

absoluteAngle.label: Absolute angle
absoluteAngle.description: If true, the angle is treated as an absolute world-space direction instead of relative to the spawn orientation.

useTargetAInitialRotation.label: Use target A initial rotation
useTargetAInitialRotation.description: If true, the mote inherits the initial rotation of target A at spawn time.

useTargetBInitialRotation.label: Use target B initial rotation
useTargetBInitialRotation.description: If true, the mote inherits the initial rotation of target B at spawn time.

fleckUsesAngleForVelocity.label: Fleck uses angle for velocity
fleckUsesAngleForVelocity.description: If true, the fleck's initial velocity direction is derived from the angle field.

rotateTowardsTargetCenter.label: Rotate towards target center
rotateTowardsTargetCenter.description: If true, the mote rotates to face the center point between the two effecter targets.

useTargetABodyAngle.label: Use target A body angle
useTargetABodyAngle.description: If true, the mote adopts the body facing angle of the pawn at target A.

useTargetBBodyAngle.label: Use target B body angle
useTargetBBodyAngle.description: If true, the mote adopts the body facing angle of the pawn at target B.

speed.label: Speed
speed.description: Movement speed in world units per second. Supports scalar and min~max range formats. Source default is 0~0.

rotation.label: Rotation
rotation.description: Initial rotation of the mote in degrees. Supports scalar and min~max range formats. Source default is 0~360.

rotationRate.label: Rotation rate
rotationRate.description: Rotation speed in degrees per second. Supports scalar and min~max range formats. Source default is 0~0.

scale.label: Scale
scale.description: Uniform scale applied to the mote or fleck. Supports scalar and min~max range formats. Source default is 1~1.

airTime.label: Air time
airTime.description: Duration in seconds the mote remains alive before despawning. Supports scalar and min~max range formats. Source default is 999999~999999.

soundDef.label: Sound def
soundDef.description: SoundDef to play when this sub-effecter triggers.

intermittentSoundInterval.label: Intermittent sound interval
intermittentSoundInterval.description: Interval in game ticks between repeated sound triggers for intermittent sub-effecters. Supports both compact min~max text and nested min/max XML. Source default is 300~600.

ticksBeforeSustainerStart.label: Ticks before sustainer start
ticksBeforeSustainerStart.description: Game ticks to wait after triggering before starting the sustained sound.

orbitOrigin.label: Orbit origin
orbitOrigin.description: If true, the mote orbits around the effect origin point.

orbitSpeed.label: Orbit speed
orbitSpeed.description: Angular velocity in degrees per second for orbiting motes. Supports scalar and min~max range formats.

orbitSnapStrength.label: Orbit snap strength
orbitSnapStrength.description: Strength of the snap force pulling a mote back to its orbit radius when displaced.

makeMoteOnSubtrigger.label: Make mote on sub-trigger
makeMoteOnSubtrigger.description: If true, a new mote is spawned each time this sub-effecter's sub-trigger fires rather than only on the main trigger.

destroyMoteOnCleanup.label: Destroy mote on cleanup
destroyMoteOnCleanup.description: If true, any mote spawned by this sub-effecter is destroyed when the effecter is cleaned up.

cameraShake.label: Camera shake
cameraShake.description: Amount of camera shake applied when this sub-effecter triggers. Supports scalar and min~max range formats.

distanceAttenuationScale.label: Distance attenuation scale
distanceAttenuationScale.description: Scale of the distance-based attenuation effect on camera shake or sound volume.

distanceAttenuationMax.label: Distance attenuation max
distanceAttenuationMax.description: Maximum distance in world units at which attenuation reaches zero. Source default is 100.

randomWeight.label: Random weight
randomWeight.description: Relative weight used when a parent GroupedChance or Random sub-effecter selects among its children. Source default is 1.

subTriggerOnSpawn.label: Sub-trigger on spawn
subTriggerOnSpawn.description: If true, this sub-effecter fires its sub-trigger immediately when the parent effecter is first triggered. Source default is true.

children.label: Children
children.description: Nested sub-effecters owned by this sub-effecter. Used by GroupedChance and Random classes to select among child effects.
